<path>/Users/jaronswab/go/src/github.com/jrswab/axe/internal/tool/web_search.go</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: package tool
2: 
3: import (
4: 	"bytes"
5: 	"context"
6: 	"encoding/json"
7: 	"fmt"
8: 	"io"
9: 	"net/http"
10: 	"os"
11: 	"strings"
12: 
13: 	"github.com/jrswab/axe/internal/provider"
14: 	"github.com/jrswab/axe/internal/toolname"
15: )
16: 
17: const (
18: 	tavilyDefaultURL       = "https://api.tavily.com"
19: 	tavilyMaxResults       = 10
20: 	tavilyMaxResponseBytes = 102400
21: 	tavilyErrorBodyMax     = 500
22: 	webSearchQueryLogMax   = 80
23: )
24: 
25: type tavilySearchRequest struct {
26: 	Query         string `json:"query"`
27: 	MaxResults    int    `json:"max_results"`
28: 	SearchDepth   string `json:"search_depth"`
29: 	APIKey        string `json:"api_key"`
30: 	IncludeImages bool   `json:"include_images"`
31: 	IncludeVideos bool   `json:"include_videos"`
32: }
33: 
34: type tavilySearchResult struct {
35: 	Title   string `json:"title"`
36: 	URL     string `json:"url"`
37: 	Content string `json:"content"`
38: }
39: 
40: type tavilySearchResponse struct {
41: 	Results []tavilySearchResult `json:"results"`
42: }
43: 
44: func webSearchEntry() ToolEntry {
45: 	return ToolEntry{
46: 		Definition: webSearchDefinition,
47: 		Execute:    webSearchExecute,
48: 	}
49: }
50: 
51: func webSearchDefinition() provider.Tool {
52: 	return provider.Tool{
53: 		Name:        toolname.WebSearch,
54: 		Description: "Search the web using Tavily and return text results including titles, URLs, and snippets.",
55: 		Parameters: map[string]provider.ToolParameter{
56: 			"query": {
57: 				Type:        "string",
58: 				Description: "The search query to perform.",
59: 				Required:    true,
60: 			},
61: 		},
62: 	}
63: }
64: 
65: func webSearchExecute(ctx context.Context, call provider.ToolCall, ec ExecContext) (result provider.ToolResult) {
66: 	query := call.Arguments["query"]
67: 
68: 	defer func() {
69: 		loggedQuery := query
70: 		if len(loggedQuery) > webSearchQueryLogMax {
71: 			loggedQuery = loggedQuery[:webSearchQueryLogMax] + "..."
72: 		}
73: 		summary := fmt.Sprintf("query %q", loggedQuery)
74: 		if result.IsError {
75: 			summary = fmt.Sprintf("%s: %s", summary, truncateResultSummary(result.Content, 120))
76: 		}
77: 		toolVerboseLog(ec, toolname.WebSearch, result, summary)
78: 	}()
79: 
80: 	if query == "" {
81: 		return provider.ToolResult{CallID: call.ID, Content: "query is required", IsError: true}
82: 	}
83: 
84: 	apiKey := os.Getenv("TAVILY_API_KEY")
85: 	if apiKey == "" {
86: 		return provider.ToolResult{CallID: call.ID, Content: "TAVILY_API_KEY environment variable is not set", IsError: true}
87: 	}
88: 
89: 	baseURL := os.Getenv("AXE_TAVILY_BASE_URL")
90: 	if baseURL == "" {
91: 		baseURL = tavilyDefaultURL
92: 	}
93: 
94: 	body, err := json.Marshal(tavilySearchRequest{
95: 		Query:         query,
96: 		MaxResults:    tavilyMaxResults,
97: 		SearchDepth:   "basic",
98: 		APIKey:        apiKey,
99: 		IncludeImages: false,
100: 		IncludeVideos: false,
101: 	})
102: 	if err != nil {
103: 		return provider.ToolResult{CallID: call.ID, Content: err.Error(), IsError: true}
104: 	}
105: 
106: 	req, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, http.MethodPost, baseURL+"/search", bytes.NewReader(body))
107: 	if err != nil {
108: 		return provider.ToolResult{CallID: call.ID, Content: err.Error(), IsError: true}
109: 	}
110: 	req.Header.Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
111: 	req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+apiKey)
112: 
113: 	resp, err := http.DefaultClient.Do(req)
114: 	if err != nil {
115: 		return provider.ToolResult{CallID: call.ID, Content: err.Error(), IsError: true}
116: 	}
117: 	defer func() {
118: 		_ = resp.Body.Close()
119: 	}()
120: 
121: 	respBody, err := io.ReadAll(io.LimitReader(resp.Body, tavilyMaxResponseBytes+1))
122: 	if err != nil {
123: 		return provider.ToolResult{CallID: call.ID, Content: err.Error(), IsError: true}
124: 	}
125: 
126: 	if len(respBody) > tavilyMaxResponseBytes {
127: 		return provider.ToolResult{CallID: call.ID, Content: "Tavily response too large to process", IsError: true}
128: 	}
129: 
130: 	if resp.StatusCode < http.StatusOK || resp.StatusCode >= http.StatusMultipleChoices {
131: 		errorBody := string(respBody)
132: 		if len(errorBody) > tavilyErrorBodyMax {
133: 			errorBody = errorBody[:tavilyErrorBodyMax]
134: 		}
135: 		return provider.ToolResult{
136: 			CallID:  call.ID,
137: 			Content: fmt.Sprintf("Tavily API error (HTTP %d): %s", resp.StatusCode, errorBody),
138: 			IsError: true,
139: 		}
140: 	}
141: 
142: 	var parsed tavilySearchResponse
143: 	if err := json.Unmarshal(respBody, &parsed); err != nil {
144: 		return provider.ToolResult{CallID: call.ID, Content: fmt.Sprintf("failed to parse Tavily response: %v", err), IsError: true}
145: 	}
146: 
147: 	if len(parsed.Results) == 0 {
148: 		return provider.ToolResult{CallID: call.ID, Content: "No results found.", IsError: false}
149: 	}
150: 
151: 	var b strings.Builder
152: 	for i, item := range parsed.Results {
153: 		if i > 0 {
154: 			b.WriteString("\n\n")
155: 		}
156: 		fmt.Fprintf(&b, "Title: %s\nURL: %s\nSnippet: %s", item.Title, item.URL, item.Content)
157: 	}
158: 
159: 	return provider.ToolResult{CallID: call.ID, Content: strings.TrimSpace(b.String()), IsError: false}
160: }
161: 
162: func truncateResultSummary(s string, maxLen int) string {
163: 	if len(s) <= maxLen {
164: 		return s
165: 	}
166: 	return s[:maxLen] + "..."
167: }

(End of file - total 167 lines)
</content>

package tool

import (
	"bytes"
	"context"
	"encoding/json"
	"fmt"
	"io"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"strings"

	"github.com/jrswab/axe/internal/provider"
	"github.com/jrswab/axe/internal/toolname"
)

const (
	tavilyDefaultURL       = "https://api.tavily.com"
	tavilyMaxResults       = 10
	tavilyMaxResponseBytes = 102400
